reviews.review_msg: This person changed my life, though I didn't know it at the time. He opened the insight into literature that I'd been stubbornly and youthfully denying myself. I became a successful writer and journal editor, albeit in science.  I'm honored to have the chance to write him this brief encomium.
Took Shakespeare, Milton and Midieval drama with Bose - loved each class!!  He was passionate about the subject and kept the classes interesting.
A very cute and sweet professor.  He has the most amusing sense of humour. His relaxed manner makes you feel at ease. A great professor.
Personable, funny, knowledgable and way hotter than Paul Budra.
Definitely one of the best!  He's so sweet and funny, but if you're lazy, the course is structured so that you really don't have to go to class for the last several weeks.

Cracks a lot of jokes that flop in a cute way... Very nice guy, fair marker. Good lecturer, a decent charming man. For the most part he's a pretty average prof, nothing too particular stand out. A good prof nonetheless...
Amazing lecturer.  One of the SFU's finest English instructors.
